description: Registry of all marketplace web templates with brand identity, DNA archetype, tier, and metadata. v0.13.0 (Session 51, Phase 2g3.2): Medical second wave live rollout — Salute (clinic archetype), Benessere (wellness archetype), Famiglia (family archetype) flipped from draft to `published_live` with three fully distinct skin folders (clinic institutional teal booking-widget + wellness serene sage calendar-spot + family warm peach phone-and-chat), 6-7 page routes each, 5 locales with real RTL fin da subito via Noto Naskh/Kufi conditional font load, 3 curated Pexels imagery pools replacing legacy Unsplash. D-047 chrome-authoring contract applied from line one (zero IT leaks across 23 skin files + 10 preview-composition literals lifted into DNA content dict). D-054 Premium Differentiation Law 10/10 on 9 sibling pairs bidirectional. Catalog now 16/20 published_live across 6 categories. v0.12.0 (Session 49): Agency live rollout. v0.11.0 (Session 48): Restaurant live-completion. v0.10.0 (Session 41): eCommerce live rollout. Earlier versions see SESSION_LOG. Every row carries a `tier` key: `published_live` or `draft`.

phase_2g3_2_medical_second_wave.notes: Medical category closes as 5/5 live (cardio + derm on specialist + salute on clinic + benessere on wellness + famiglia on family). First N=5 test of D-054 10-gate law on a multi-archetype category. Stub-files-first pattern introduced for locale wiring. Catalog 16/20.

phase_2g3_6f_agency_live.notes: Agency identity-crash (Session 16 CRITICO #5) closed. Category 2/2 live.

templates.name: Vertex — Creative Agency
templates.tagline: Dove la creatività incontra la strategia
templates.tier_reason: Phase 2g3.6f closed in Session 49 (Agency live rollout). Vertex ships full agency-creative-studio skin folder + per-template content registry + 6 page routes (home/studio/capacita/lavori/manifesto/contatti) + project_detail dossier route, all 200. 5 locales (IT/EN/FR/ES/AR) with real RTL for Arabic via Amiri+Noto-Kufi font load. D-053 gate green. D-054 10/10 vs Aura (editorial ink paper + serif italic pull-quote hero + indexed case-study ledger + dossier-request CTA + Milan curatorial editorial voice vs midnight-violet + product-console hero + sprint cards + glow pill + product-growth register). D-047 chrome-authoring contract applied from line one.

templates.tagline: Design che parla da sé
templates.typography: Plus Jakarta Sans + Inter + JetBrains Mono

templates.tier_reason: Phase 2g3.6f closed in Session 49 (Agency live rollout). Aura ships full agency-digital-studio skin folder + per-template content registry + 6 page routes (home/studio/capabilities/lavori/sprint/brief) + project_detail case route, all 200. 5 locales (IT/EN/FR/ES/AR) with real RTL for Arabic via Noto-Naskh+Noto-Kufi font load. D-053 gate green. D-054 10/10 vs Vertex (midnight-violet page + product-console hero + dashboard tile + sprint telemetry chip + shiplog-console footer + glow-pill CTA + TechCrunch/Linear product register vs editorial ink paper + serif italic pull-quote + indexed case-study ledger + Milan curatorial editorial voice). D-047 chrome-authoring contract applied from line one.

templates.name: Pragma — Corporate Suite
templates.tagline: Soluzioni concrete per il tuo business
templates.tier_reason: Phase 2g3.3 closed in Session 32 (Business live rollout). Phase 2g3.3b closed in Session 40 (Business i18n completion pass) — Pragma now ships in 5 locales (IT/EN/FR/ES/AR) with real RTL for Arabic. EN: FT/HBR institutional. FR: Les Echos vouvoiement + insecable spaces. ES: Cinco Días peninsular usted. AR: MSA boardroom register, Latin proper names, Latin digits. RTL CSS block on .cs-* selectors with conditional Amiri+Noto-Kufi font load. D-053 gate green, D-054 10/10 vs Elevate.

templates.name: Elevate — Startup Landing
templates.tagline: Lancia il tuo prodotto con impatto
templates.tier_reason: Phase 2g3.3 closed in Session 32 (Business live rollout). Phase 2g3.3b closed in Session 40 (Business i18n completion pass) — Elevate now ships in 5 locales (IT/EN/FR/ES/AR) with real RTL for Arabic. EN: TechCrunch/Linear/Figma SaaS direct (`you`). FR: Maddyness modern SaaS with anglicismes. ES: Xataka/K Fund peninsular `tú`. AR: Wamda modern startup MSA, Latin product names + Latin digits. RTL CSS block on .sl-* selectors with conditional Noto-Naskh+Noto-Kufi font load. Voice stays sharply distinct from Pragma's institutional advisory register.

templates.name: Gusto — Fine Dining
templates.tagline: Tradizione e innovazione a tavola
templates.tier_reason: Full live preview shipped Session 11 (cardio + gusto). i18n/RTL closed Session 29 (D-063) — 5 locales (it/en/fr/es/ar) with real RTL for Arabic, new html[dir="rtl"] .fd-* CSS block in fine-dining _base.html, Amiri + Noto Kufi Arabic fonts conditional on AR. Motion (D-058) + ultra-premium interactions (D-062) preserved. 52/52 routes green. D-053 gate fully met.

templates.name: Sapore — Trattoria & Pizzeria
templates.tagline: Il sapore di casa, dal 1987
templates.tier_reason: Phase 2g3.6 closed in Session 48 (Restaurant live-completion). Sapore ships full trattoria-warm skin folder + per-template content registry + 6 page routes (home/menu/storia/forno/eventi/contatti) all 200. 5 locales (IT/EN/FR/ES/AR) with real RTL for Arabic via Amiri+Noto-Kufi font load. D-053 gate green. D-054 10/10 vs Gusto (warm cream paper + Libre Baskerville + Caveat script + phone-and-whatsapp + Roman family register vs editorial dark + Playfair italic + concierge tile + sommelier-chef register) and vs Brace (warm cream paper + family chalkboard + reservation + Trastevere voice vs near-black + neon yellow + brutalist Big Shoulders + order-now + Bologna street voice). D-047 chrome-authoring contract applied from line one.

D-053 gate green. D-054 10/10 vs Gusto (near-black + neon yellow + Big Shoulders Display brutalist UPPERCASE + product-cutout hero + AGGIUNGI cards + GLOVO/DELIVEROO marquee + counter-status mono chips + Bologna street voice vs editorial dark charcoal + Playfair italic + serif-centered nav + concierge-reservation + sommelier register) and vs Sapore (dark + neon + order-now flow vs warm cream + family chalkboard + reservation flow). D-047 chrome-authoring contract applied from line one.

templates.name: Benessere — Centro Olistico
templates.tagline: Equilibrio fra corpo, mente e respiro

Benessere ships full wellness skin folder + per-template content registry + 7 page routes (home/filosofia/rituali/ambienti/professionisti/contatti/prenota) all 200. 5 locales (IT/EN/FR/ES/AR) with real RTL for Arabic. D-053 gate green. D-054 10/10 vs Cardio/Derm specialist (cream warm + full-bleed-manifesto photo hero + Cormorant italic 96px + dotted-leader pricelist cards + calendar-spot 7-day CTA + airy density + Bergamo Alta holistic register vs editorial-serif specialist pull-quote + private-request email + cream paper prestige clinical). Sharp differentiation vs Salute (serene olistico non institutional) and Famiglia (adult retreat non pediatric warm). D-047 applied line-one.

templates.name: Famiglia — Studio Pediatrico
templates.tagline: Cresciamo insieme ai vostri bambini

Famiglia ships full family skin folder + per-template content registry + 6 page routes (home/studio/visite/crescita/pediatre/contatti) all 200. 5 locales (IT/EN/FR/ES/AR) with real RTL for Arabic. D-053 gate green. D-054 10/10 vs Cardio/Derm specialist (warm peach + centered-soft rounded photo card hero + Quicksand rounded friendly + portrait-stack team cards + phone-and-chat CTA [NO booking form] + airy density + Torino Crocetta pediatric warm register vs cream paper + editorial-serif prestige + private-request email). Differentiation vs Salute (pediatric intimate non institutional generalist) and Benessere (warm family protective non serene adult retreat). D-047 applied line-one.

templates.name: Cardio — Studio Specialistico
templates.tagline: Cardiologia clinica e secondi pareri
templates.tier_reason: Full live preview shipped Session 11 + D-047-lifted chrome Session 14 (Phase 2g.2) + i18n/RTL pilot Session 23 (D-059). 5 locales with real RTL for Arabic. D-053 gate green.

templates.name: Dermatologia Elite — Studio Ricciardi
templates.tagline: Dermatologia clinica, chirurgica ed estetica · Roma Veneto
templates.reuse_notes: Second template on the `specialist` archetype. Reuses the same live_templates/medical/specialist/ skin as cardio-studio-specialistico — ZERO new HTML files. Differentiated via brand (Studio Ricciardi), accent (forest green #3d5437 vs cardio red #9c2a2a), font (Bodoni Moda vs Cormorant), and dermatology-specific content registry.
templates.tier_reason: Full live preview shipped Session 13 via specialist archetype reuse (zero new HTML). i18n/RTL closed Session 24 — 5 locales on the reused specialist skin. D-053 gate green.

D-054 10/10 vs Juris (serif gold vs sans blue · ledger vs sprint · consultation vs strategy-call).

D-054 10/10 vs Lex (sans blue vs serif gold · sprint vs ledger · strategy-call vs consultation).

templates.tagline: La casa dei tuoi sogni ti aspetta
templates.tier_reason: Phase 2g3.7 · Session 53 · mass-market archetype (search-listings-grid hero, property-tile-specs cards, viewing-request CTA, daylight imagery). 5 locales + real RTL. D-054 10/10 vs Villa (Poppins navy emerald vs Cormorant black champagne · tile grid vs dossier · visit vs private viewing · urban IT vs Continental).

templates.name: Villa — Immobili di Lusso
templates.tagline: L'eccellenza nell'immobiliare di lusso
templates.tier_reason: Phase 2g3.7 · Session 53 · ultra-luxury-cinematic archetype (fullbleed-editorial-cover hero, property-dossier cards, private-viewing CTA, champagne/black palette, Continental territory). 5 locales + real RTL. D-054 10/10 vs Casa (editorial vs tile · fullbleed vs search · Cormorant vs Poppins · concierge vs visit · Continental vs Italian-urban) and 10/10 vs Luxe (real-estate dossier vs fashion lookbook · private viewing vs atelier request · no cart).

templates.name: Chiara — Portfolio Creativo
templates.tagline: Ogni progetto racconta una storia
templates.dna_notes: Session 18: cream paper page with NO big hero photo — the hero IS the typography (huge Syne display headline + numbered project index card right). 4 indexed rows top-right, 3-card case-study panel bottom, clients ribbon + studio coordinates split footer. Deliberately photo-independent so a failing image URL degrades gracefully.
templates.tier_reason: Phase 2g3.4 closed in Session 34 (Portfolio live rollout) — full editorial-designer-grid skin folder + content registry + 5 page routes (home/studio/lavoro/processo/contatti) + project_detail dossier route, all 200. D-053 gate green. D-054 10/10 vs Pixel (cream paper + ghost-rule + typographic ledger vs near-black + bracket-mono + fullbleed-cover). i18n shape ready (IT-only at promotion).

templates.name: Pixel — Portfolio Fotografico
templates.tagline: L'arte di catturare l'attimo
templates.dna_notes: Session 18: near-black page with a dominant fullbleed photograph covering ~62% of the canvas, corner frame marks, top-left series counter chip, monospaced EXIF credit bar pinned to the hero bottom (pellicola/ottica/stampa cells), 4-frame filmstrip gallery below with named series + disciplines + years, 4-cell EXIF footer. Bracketed [ ... ] CTAs in mono-uppercase — cinematic and technical.
templates.tier_reason: Phase 2g3.4 closed in Session 34 (Portfolio live rollout) — full cinematic-photographer skin folder + content registry + 5 page routes (home/serie/biografia/pubblicazioni/contatti) + series_detail page (cover hero + EXIF strip + essay + 6-image gallery), all 200. D-053 gate green. D-054 10/10 vs Chiara (near-black + bracket-mono + fullbleed-cover vs cream paper + ghost-rule + typographic ledger). i18n shape ready (IT-only at promotion).

templates.name: Bottega — Shop Artigianale
templates.tagline: Fatto a mano, fatto col cuore
templates.dna_notes: Session 15: full cream page, typographic-led hero (no photo), rubber-stamped info panel, N°-labeled edition cards. Macro tone differentiation from Luxe — same imagery pool, opposite page color.
templates.tier_reason: Phase 2g3.5 closed in Session 41 (eCommerce live rollout). Bottega ships full artisan-workshop skin folder + per-template content registry + 6 page routes (home/shop/product/atelier/journal/contatti) all 200. 5 locales (IT/EN/FR/ES/AR) with real RTL for Arabic via Amiri+Noto-Kufi font load. D-053 gate green. D-054 10/10 vs Luxe (warm cream + typographic hero + phone-and-whatsapp + Tuscan artisan voice vs ink charcoal + full-bleed editorial cover + private-request + maison editoriale voice). D-047 chrome-authoring contract applied from line one.

templates.name: Luxe — Fashion Store
templates.tagline: Stile senza compromessi
templates.dna_notes: Session 15: full dark charcoal page, italic Cormorant 108px headline, full-bleed fashion-model cover, gold editorial tile strip. Shares imagery pool with Bottega — differentiated purely by macro tone + typography.
templates.tier_reason: Phase 2g3.5 closed in Session 41 (eCommerce live rollout). Luxe ships full fashion-editorial skin folder + per-template content registry + 6 page routes (home/collezione/product/maison/lookbook/contatti) all 200. 5 locales (IT/EN/FR/ES/AR) with real RTL for Arabic via Amiri+Noto-Kufi font load. D-053 gate green. D-054 10/10 vs Bottega (ink charcoal + italic Cormorant 108px hero + full-bleed editorial cover + private-request + maison voice vs warm cream + Libre Baskerville typographic monolith + phone-and-whatsapp + Tuscan artisan voice). D-047 chrome-authoring contract applied from line one. Latin proper names (Maison Luxe, Vogue, Hermès) preserved across all locales via unicode-bidi: isolate.
